ticket_goal: Graceful Error Handling & Global Error Boundary

Gemini CLI.findings: Fetched issue details. Ticket involves global error handling and boundaries.

TECHNICAL SPECS.synthesis: Implement a hierarchical error handling strategy: 1) Global Boundary, 2) Granular Boundaries, 3) Standardized Error Response Utility.

fixes_applied: Implemented standardized API error response utility in src/lib/errors.ts.
Refactored error.tsx and global-error.tsx to use the new UI component.
Added Playwright E2E test for error handling.

expected_output.validation: Success: Hierarchical error boundaries and API standardization verified.
expected_output.architecture: Matches technical specs in discovery round.
